_meta.title: Wave 4 QA-HOLD-1 — LABINOV / Destiny Dental operating-status (AB7) re-scan addendum
_meta.scope: Chicagoland / IL only; Boston / MA parked
_meta.mode: files-only evidence addendum; no DB writes; no manifest mutation; no 310 mutation; consolidation frozen
_meta.purpose: Resolve QA-HOLD-1 from VERDICT_QA_WAVE4_INITIAL_20260621.json: the AB7 operating-status carry-forward for location_id fd93e6934ac6c59c plus the ao:LABINOV_BORIS member network referenced in the manifest stale_closed_notes. Provide a fresh, in-session, transcribed operating-status re-scan. This addendum is advisory for the gate owner; it does NOT change the 310 and does NOT change the manifest.

ab_rules_applied.AB7: Before a row remains in any eventual VALIDATED floor, obtain an operating-status re-scan with a transcribed source; if confirmed closed/relocated, exclude even if the network is released.
ab_rules_applied.AB9: Network release authorization. ao:LABINOV_BORIS is AB9-satisfied (release_eligible, 7/7 released) per the canonical manifest. This addendum does NOT alter that release; it only supplies the AB7 operating-status evidence QA found missing.
ab_rules_applied.AH3: No retrospective assertion — every URL below was fetched/transcribed in THIS session (2026-06-22).

network_identity_correction.issue: The QA verdict tagged target fd93e6934ac6c59c with flag 'AB9_LABINOV_protected', implying membership in ao:LABINOV_BORIS. That is a labeling imprecision.
network_identity_correction.finding: In the 310 ready file (_ready_to_validate_wave3_fixed_20260621.json), fd93e6934ac6c59c carries network_id = 'ao:WILSON-ADELEKE_SIMONE' — a SIBLING Destiny Dental / ProSmile friendly-PC network ('PRO DENTAL IL - CHAD WISE PC', AO = Simone Wilson-Adeleke), NOT the literal ao:LABINOV_BORIS member set ('D2 DENTAL AT OAK STREET, P.C.', AO = Boris Labinov).
network_identity_correction.relationship: Both ao:WILSON-ADELEKE_SIMONE and ao:LABINOV_BORIS are friendly-PC wrappers on the SAME Destiny Dental brand, operated by L2 Management, PE-backed by ProSmile Holdings LLC (TriSpan). The target is LABINOV-RELATED through the shared Destiny/ProSmile platform, not by literal AO membership.
network_identity_correction.consequence: No network release decision is touched. The target's pe_backed=true / branded_dso tier is unchanged. This addendum only supplies the AB7 operating-status evidence.

summary.courtesy_sibling_disposition: keep_ready (1, domain:destinydentalcare.com — not in LABINOV scope, advisory only)
summary.headline: TARGET fd93e6934ac6c59c (Destiny Dental — Oak Park, 1 Chicago Ave 60302) is CONFIRMED OPEN. The Wave-4 Lane-3 'operating_status=closed_or_relocated' flag is a FALSE POSITIVE, refuted by a fresh transcribed source (the office's own active page) + the brand locator + Yelp 'Updated February 2026 - 39 Reviews'. The 7 ao:LABINOV_BORIS 'D2 Dental at Oak Street, P.C.' friendly-PC addresses (all provider_count=0) could NOT be confirmed as currently-open patient doors AND no transcribed closure source exists — conservative AB7 disposition is hold_operating_status (NOT reject_closed, NOT keep_ready).
summary.important_caveat: hold_operating_status is an AB7 evidence-status note, not a closure assertion. None of the 7 D2 addresses has a transcribed closed/relocated source; they simply lack a current open-door confirmation (absent from the brand locator, no active patient-facing page, provider_count=0 in the federal data). The conservative posture is to withhold them from a VALIDATED operating floor pending a current open-door confirmation or a documented closure — exactly the AB7 ceiling. This addendum does NOT remove them from the 310 (AB9 release stands).

advisory_for_gate_owner.interpretation: QA-HOLD-1's specific subject (fd93e6934ac6c59c) is RESOLVED in favor of keep_ready — the closed_or_relocated flag is a false positive and AB7 is satisfied with a fresh transcribed open-status source. The 7 ao:LABINOV_BORIS D2 shell addresses remain AB9-released in the 310 but are AB7-unconfirmed for operating status; they should be held out of any eventual VALIDATED operating floor until a current open-door source or a documented closure is obtained. This is consistent with the manifest's own stale_closed_notes and with blocks_wave4_acceptance=false (these holds do not block Wave-4 acceptance).
what_this_addendum_does_not_do: Does not edit the 310 ready file.
Does not edit the canonical manifest or its ao_network_release_decisions.
Does not assert reject_closed on any LABINOV row (no transcribed closure source exists).
Does not expand AO reach or generate any new AO fan-out.
